title: Import from a barrel file
message: This ships extra code in your app bundle & slows startup. Import directly from: "../shared/analytics/event-bus-bridge", "../shared/analytics/product-events".
help: Import from the direct path: `import { Button } from './components/Button'` instead of `./components`
